title: Selling Presets Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You've spent months perfecting your presets, but when you try to sell them, PayPal and Stripe shut you out. You're not alone. Many creators in Nigeria, like you, face geographic restrictions that block access to these popular payment processors. You need a reliable way to sell your presets without relying on PayPal or Stripe. The good news is that there's a better option. No PayPal required. Here's a side-by-side analysis of your choices.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal and Stripe are major players in the payment processing space, but they come with a catch: geographic restrictions. They block creators in Nigeria, along with many other countries. This means you can't use their services to sell your presets. On the other hand, NOWPayments is a cryptocurrency-native payment processor that doesn't have these restrictions. It allows creators like you to sell their presets without worrying about geographic limitations. But what about the fees and payment speeds?
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict geographic restrictions in place, which means they won't work for you in Nigeria. They're not the only ones, though - Gumroad and Payhip also have similar restrictions. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is designed to be more inclusive. It supports a wide range of cryptocurrencies and doesn't have the same geographic restrictions as PayPal and Stripe. This makes it a more viable option for creators in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speeds and fees, NOWPayments is actually a more attractive option. It offers fast payment speeds and competitive fees compared to PayPal and Stripe. Plus, with NOWPayments, you don't have to worry about the hidden fees and charges that often come with traditional payment processors. You get to keep more of your hard-earned money. But what about the automation and delivery capabilities of each option?
Don't let geographic restrictions hold you back from selling your presets.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

NOWPayments offers a range of automation and delivery capabilities that make it easier to sell your presets. With its Web3 Wallet Connect feature, you can create a seamless checkout experience for your customers. Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) - https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html - integrates your wallet directly into your website, making it easy for customers to pay with their preferred cryptocurrency. This means you can focus on what matters most - creating presets that delight your customers.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're looking for a reliable way to sell your presets without relying on PayPal or Stripe, NOWPayments is the clear winner. Its lack of geographic restrictions, fast payment speeds, and competitive fees make it a more attractive option. Plus, with its Web3 Wallet Connect feature, you can create a seamless checkout experience for your customers. Take control of your presets sales and start selling today.

Your Action Checklist

To start selling your presets with NOWPayments, follow these concrete steps: 1. Sign up for a NOWPayments account and connect your wallet 2. Integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website 3. Set up your presets pricing and payment options 4. Start selling your presets and track your sales in real-time 5. Use the funds to reinvest in your business or enjoy the fruits of your labor. By following these steps, you can start selling your presets without relying on PayPal or Stripe.
